headline: BHP Establishes Rail Routes for Jansen Ahead of Potash Production
summary: BHP inks rail deals with CNI and CP, giving the Jansen potash project dual access to Vancouver's Westshore as first production nears.

headline: BASFY Launches InVigor Gold L322 to Expand US Canola Production
summary: BASFY debuts InVigor Gold L322 canola hybrid, aiming to push U.S. acreage into hotter, drier regions, with Montana launch eyed for 2027.
